# CIRCE Theme System

Local-only switchable themes for SenseCAP Watcher LVGL UI.

| Document | Contents |
|----------|----------|
| [THEME_ARCHITECTURE.md](THEME_ARCHITECTURE.md) | Module design, LVGL apply path |
| [THEME_COLOR_PALETTES.md](THEME_COLOR_PALETTES.md) | 10 theme hex palettes |
| [THEME_SWITCHING_MODEL.md](THEME_SWITCHING_MODEL.md) | More → Appearance, NVS |
| [THEME_ACCESSIBILITY_GUIDE.md](THEME_ACCESSIBILITY_GUIDE.md) | Contrast, overload, encoder |

**Default theme:** Circe Classic  
**Selection:** More → Appearance (Phase 5 firmware)

No internet required. No sync.

See also [../ui/CIRCE_VISUAL_LANGUAGE.md](../ui/CIRCE_VISUAL_LANGUAGE.md).
